testcase.name: Post Demo 2

failure.message: Post2.feature:17 - path: $, actual: {"args":{},"headers":{"content-length":"45","x-forwarded-proto":"https","host":"postman-echo.com","content-type":"application\/json; charset=UTF-8","accept-encoding":"gzip, br","user-agent":"Apache-HttpClient\/4.5.5 (Java\/1.8.0_333)","accept":"application\/json"},"data":{"name":"Carlos","Age":27,"lastname":"Ríos"},"form":{},"files":{},"json":{"name":"Carlos","Age":27,"lastname":"Ríos"},"url":"https:\/\/postman-echo.com\/post"}, expected: {name=Carlos, lastname=Ríos, Age=27}, reason: actual value has 4 more key(s) than expected: {args={}, headers={"content-length":"45","x-forwarded-proto":"https","host":"postman-echo.com","content-type":"application\/json; charset=UTF-8","accept-encoding":"gzip, br","user-agent":"Apache-HttpClient\/4.5.5 (Java\/1.8.0_333)","accept":"application\/json"}, data={"name":"Carlos","Age":27,"lastname":"Ríos"}, form={}, files={}, json={"name":"Carlos","Age":27,"lastname":"Ríos"}, url=https://postman-echo.com/post}

testcase.failure:
* url 'https://postman-echo.com' .......................................... passed * header Accept = 'application/json' ...................................... passed * def expectedOutput = read('response1.json') ............................. passed * def requestBody = read('request1.json') ................................. passed * def requestBody2 = read('request1.json') ................................ passed Given path '/post' ........................................................ passed And request { "name": "Carlos", "lastname": "Ríos", "Age": 27 } ........... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed And print response ........................................................ passed And match $ == expectedOutput ............................................. failed
